description: CloudDlpPiiCheckComponent — pass/fail asset check for PII in a DataFrame.

asset_key.label: Asset Key
asset_key.description: Asset key the check validates (the upstream DataFrame).

text_columns.label: Text Columns
text_columns.description: Columns whose string values are inspected. Each row's columns are joined with newlines.

forbidden_info_types.label: Forbidden Info Types
forbidden_info_types.description: InfoTypes that, if detected, count as failures.

min_likelihood.label: Min Likelihood
min_likelihood.description: Minimum likelihood to count. Default LIKELY (cuts noise vs. inspect_asset's POSSIBLE).

max_allowed_findings.label: Max Allowed Findings
max_allowed_findings.description: Maximum forbidden findings before the check fails. 0 = any forbidden finding fails.

sample_size.label: Sample Size
sample_size.description: Only scan the first N rows. Default 200 — full scans on large frames get expensive.

blocking.label: Blocking
blocking.description: If True, failure blocks downstream materializations.

name: Cloud Dlp Pii Check
